mapper.select: SELECT p.plan_name AS planName, p.plan_category AS planCategory, p.inspection_frequency AS inspectionFrequency, p.valid_start_date AS validStartDate, p.valid_end_date AS validEndDate, p.inspect_status AS inspectStatus, c.construction_name AS constructionName, c.address, o.organization_name AS organizationName, a.area_name AS areaName, u.name AS inspectorName, ic.content AS inspectionContent FROM tpc_inspection_plan p LEFT JOIN tpc_construction c ON p.construction_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tbl_organization o ON p.org_id = o.id LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node a ON c.area_code = a.code LEFT JOIN tbl_user u ON p.inspector = u.id LEFT JOIN tpc_inspection_content ic ON o.id = ic.org_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT ic.id, ic.type, ic.content, ic.org_id AS orgId, ic.create_time AS createTime, ic.create_id AS createId, ic.update_time AS updateTime, ic.update_id AS updateId, ic.deleted FROM tpc_inspection_plan_content pc INNER JOIN tpc_inspection_content ic ON pc.content_id = ic.id WHERE pc.plan_id = #{planId} AND pc.deleted = 0 AND ic.deleted = 0
